headline: Conagra Brands Is Set to Invest $220 Million in a Manufacturing Plant But Its Stock is Down This Week. Is the Packaged Foods Company a Buy in 2026?
summary: Conagra is investing in its business, but that may not be a good reason to buy the stock.
